summary: Phase 7 MCP tool (ask_graph) fully implemented: added askGraphDefinition and handleAskGraph to graph tools, registered in MCP server, created handler tests. All 3 tasks complete. 10/10 handler tests pass, 13/13 server tests pass, TypeScript compiles cleanly.
completed: Task 1: Added askGraphDefinition and handleAskGraph to packages/cli/src/mcp/tools/graph.ts
Task 2: Registered ask_graph in MCP server and updated server test tool count (42 -> 44, was already 43 before this change)
Task 3: Created handler tests at packages/cli/tests/mcp/tools/graph-ask.test.ts (10 tests)
decisions: Handler follows exact same pattern as handleDetectAnomalies: sanitizePath, loadGraphStore, graphNotFoundError, dynamic import, try/catch
askGraph is imported dynamically from @harness-engineering/graph to match existing ESM pattern
Tool registered adjacent to detect_anomalies in both TOOL_DEFINITIONS and TOOL_HANDLERS
Tests go in separate file graph-ask.test.ts to keep graph.test.ts focused on existing tools
Server test tool count was already 43 (not 42 as plan assumed), updated to 44
